locations exist, the billing location is used. 

When the provider location ID (variable called PRVDR_LCTN_ID) equals ‘000’, it means that a license or 
identifier applies to all locations for the provider. When the state sends a license or identifier record 
with PRVDR_LCTN_ID ‘000’ but no corresponding location record, a record location record is added to 
ensure referential integrity.
